components.name: feed-stars
components.title: Feed Stars
components.summary: Animated 1–5 star rating control with playful per-star faces.

stories.title: Empty
stories.summary: Unset rating — all five stars await a selection.

stories.title: Preset value
stories.summary: Pre-selected to four stars on load via the value attribute.

stories.title: Disabled
stories.summary: Non-interactive and dimmed while still showing the current rating.

stories.title: Themed (amber on light)
stories.summary: Warm amber palette tuned for a light background via CSS custom properties.

snippets.title: Listen for rating changes

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Initial/current rating. Integers 1–5 select that many stars; any other value leaves the control unset.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: When present, makes the control non-interactive and dims it.

events.name: change
events.detail: { value: number } — the new rating (0 when cleared)
events.when: The user selects a new rating, or clears it by clicking the already-selected star.
events.description: Notifies listeners of rating changes with the new numeric value.

cssProperties.name: --feed-stars-active-pale
cssProperties.description: Particle/dust color animated around active stars.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Clears the rating back to unset (value = 0).

components.name: flow-globe
components.title: Flow Globe
components.summary: Animated geospatial flows as glowing arcs on a rotating 3D globe or flat map.

stories.title: Ocean globe
stories.summary: Default ocean theme with demo flows on a rotating globe.

stories.title: Custom flows with roles
stories.summary: Explicit source/hub/destination roles, custom flow data, and country names.
stories.html:
<flow-globe
  title="Design System Adoption"
  subtitle="Component imports by region"
  theme="ocean"
  producers="US,IN"
  hubs="DE,SG"
  consumers="GB,FR,JP,AU"
  data='[{"sourceId":"US","targetId":"DE","value":120},{"sourceId":"IN","targetId":"SG","value":90},{"sourceId":"DE","targetId":"GB","value":70},{"sourceId":"SG","targetId":"JP","value":50},{"sourceId":"SG","targetId":"AU","value":40}]'
  country-names='{"SG":"Singapore","AU":"Australia"}'
></flow-globe>

stories.title: Slate map projection
stories.summary: Flat equirectangular map with the slate theme and legend.
stories.html: <flow-globe title="Global Supply Chain" theme="slate" projection="map" height="420px"></flow-globe>

stories.title: Coffee, no controls
stories.summary: Coffee theme with auto-rotate, controls, and legend all disabled.

stories.title: Ember with arc override
stories.summary: Compact ember globe with a custom arc color via CSS custom property.

snippets.title: Replace flow data programmatically

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Display title shown at the top of the globe.

attributes.name: subtitle
attributes.description: Display subtitle shown below the title.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Color palette for the globe, arcs, and nodes.

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Wrapper height as any CSS length.

attributes.name: projection
attributes.description: Render mode: orthographic globe or flat equirectangular map.

attributes.name: auto-rotate
attributes.description: Continuous auto-rotation. Drag-to-rotate still works when false.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description: Show the Globe/Map toggle buttons.

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description: Show the Source/Hub/Destination role legend.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Flow array of { sourceId, targetId, value } using ISO-3166 alpha-2 country codes.

attributes.name: country-names
attributes.description: Object mapping country IDs to custom display names.

attributes.name: producers
attributes.description: Country codes to color as source nodes.

attributes.name: hubs
attributes.description: Country codes to color as intermediate/hub nodes.

attributes.name: consumers
attributes.description: Country codes to color as destination nodes.

attributes.name: value-suffix
attributes.description: Suffix appended to flow values.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Replace the flow data and re-render.

methods.name: configure
methods.description: Apply multiple options (attributes, data, countryNames) at once; returns the element for chaining.

components.name: kerala-district-map
components.title: Kerala District Map
components.summary: A data-driven SVG map of Kerala districts with choropleth fills, Malayalam labels, and selectable district events.

stories.title: Malayalam rainfall
stories.summary: Malayalam labels, Baloo Chettan 2 opt-in, selected district, and an auto gradient legend.
stories.html:
<kerala-district-map
  locale="ml"
  labels="id"
  size="430"
  tint-color="#0ea5e9"
  heading="കേരള മഴ"
  subheading="സാമ്പിൾ മൺസൂൺ സൂചിക"
  legend="gradient"
  legend-title="മഴ"
  value-suffix=" mm"
  selected-district="ernakulam"
  load-google-fonts
  data='{"kasaragod":{"value":312,"rank":"#8","zone":"North"},"kannur":{"value":348,"rank":"#5","zone":"North"},"wayanad":{"value":414,"rank":"#1","zone":"High range"},"kozhikode":{"value":362,"rank":"#4","zone":"North coast"},"malappuram":{"value":331,"rank":"#7","zone":"Central"},"palakkad":{"value":226,"rank":"#14","zone":"Gap"},"thrissur":{"value":284,"rank":"#11","zone":"Central"},"ernakulam":{"value":292,"rank":"#10","zone":"Metro"},"idukki":{"value":405,"rank":"#2","zone":"High range"},"kottayam":{"value":338,"rank":"#6","zone":"Midland"},"alappuzha":{"value":276,"rank":"#12","zone":"Backwaters"},"pathanamthitta":{"value":388,"rank":"#3","zone":"Forest edge"},"kollam":{"value":302,"rank":"#9","zone":"South coast"},"thiruvananthapuram":{"value":252,"rank":"#13","zone":"Capital"}}'
></kerala-district-map>

stories.title: English adoption map
stories.summary: English district-name labels, fixed 0-100 domain, and a teal tint.
stories.html:
<kerala-district-map
  labels="name"
  size="440"
  tint-color="#14b8a6"
  heading="Kerala adoption"
  subheading="Demo district coverage"
  legend="gradient"
  legend-title="Adoption"
  value-suffix="%"
  domain-min="0"
  domain-max="100"
  selected-district="thiruvananthapuram"
  data='{"kasaragod":{"value":42,"segment":"Priority"},"kannur":{"value":51,"segment":"Growth"},"wayanad":{"value":63,"segment":"Stable"},"kozhikode":{"value":68,"segment":"Priority"},"malappuram":{"value":57,"segment":"Growth"},"palakkad":{"value":39,"segment":"Stable"},"thrissur":{"value":72,"segment":"Priority"},"ernakulam":{"value":86,"segment":"Growth"},"idukki":{"value":58,"segment":"Stable"},"kottayam":{"value":74,"segment":"Priority"},"alappuzha":{"value":66,"segment":"Growth"},"pathanamthitta":{"value":61,"segment":"Stable"},"kollam":{"value":69,"segment":"Priority"},"thiruvananthapuram":{"value":83,"segment":"Growth"}}'
></kerala-district-map>

stories.title: Matched Baloo fonts
stories.summary: Use Baloo Chettan 2 for English/Latin and Malayalam text when a single visual voice is desired.
stories.html:
<kerala-district-map
  locale="ml"
  labels="name"
  size="440"
  tint-color="#f97316"
  heading="Kerala rainfall"
  subheading="English and മലയാളം share Baloo Chettan 2"
  legend="gradient"
  legend-title="Rainfall"
  value-suffix=" mm"
  font-en="baloo-chettan-2"
  font-ml="baloo-chettan-2"
  load-google-fonts
  data='{"kasaragod":{"value":312,"rank":"#8","zone":"North"},"kannur":{"value":348,"rank":"#5","zone":"North"},"wayanad":{"value":414,"rank":"#1","zone":"High range"},"kozhikode":{"value":362,"rank":"#4","zone":"North coast"},"malappuram":{"value":331,"rank":"#7","zone":"Central"},"palakkad":{"value":226,"rank":"#14","zone":"Gap"},"thrissur":{"value":284,"rank":"#11","zone":"Central"},"ernakulam":{"value":292,"rank":"#10","zone":"Metro"},"idukki":{"value":405,"rank":"#2","zone":"High range"},"kottayam":{"value":338,"rank":"#6","zone":"Midland"},"alappuzha":{"value":276,"rank":"#12","zone":"Backwaters"},"pathanamthitta":{"value":388,"rank":"#3","zone":"Forest edge"},"kollam":{"value":302,"rank":"#9","zone":"South coast"},"thiruvananthapuram":{"value":252,"rank":"#13","zone":"Capital"}}'
></kerala-district-map>

stories.title: Categorical regions
stories.summary: Per-district color overrides with a slotted custom legend.
stories.html: Region North Central South

snippets.title: Set data programmatically
Listen for district selection
Tune frosted overlay surfaces

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: District-keyed data object. Keys can be id, slug, English district name, exact Malayalam name, or accepted alias.

attributes.name: value-key
attributes.description: Object field used as the numeric choropleth value.

attributes.name: domain-min
attributes.description: Minimum color-scale value. Omit for automatic domain.

attributes.name: domain-max
attributes.description: Maximum color-scale value. Omit for automatic domain.

attributes.name: value-label
attributes.description: Label used by default legend/details text.

attributes.name: value-suffix
attributes.description: Suffix appended to values in default details and legend labels.

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Light/dark rendering mode. System follows prefers-color-scheme.

attributes.name: tint-color
attributes.description: Seed color used to derive choropleth stops and district strokes.

attributes.name: empty-color
attributes.description: Fill for districts with missing or non-numeric values.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Desired map width in pixels; the host still clamps to available width.

attributes.name: labels
attributes.description: SVG label mode. Name labels follow locale.

attributes.name: locale
attributes.description: Display locale for names, ARIA labels, and default details. lang="ml" also works.

attributes.name: font-en
attributes.description: English/Latin/default font preset. Choose baloo-chettan-2 intentionally for a matched Malayalam look.

attributes.name: font-ml
attributes.description: Malayalam-script font preset.

attributes.name: load-google-fonts
attributes.description: Explicitly load selected Google Fonts. Without it, fallback stacks are used.

attributes.name: selected-district
attributes.description: Select/highlight a district by id, slug, English name, alias, or exact Malayalam name.

attributes.name: hover-template
attributes.description: Trusted HTML template for tooltip/details. Placeholders include {id}, {code}, {name}, {displayName}, {nameEn}, {nameMl}, {slug}, {value}, {normalized}, {fields}, and data keys.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Built-in header title. Header overlay is hidden when heading and subheading are empty.

attributes.name: subheading
attributes.description: Built-in header subtitle.

attributes.name: header-position
attributes.description: Position for built-in/slotted header overlay.

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description: Show or hide the auto gradient legend.

attributes.name: legend-title
attributes.description: Auto legend title.

attributes.name: legend-position
attributes.description: Position for built-in/slotted legend overlay.

attributes.name: border-color
attributes.description: Base district boundary color override.

attributes.name: hover-border-color
attributes.description: Hover/focus boundary color override.

attributes.name: selected-border-color
attributes.description: Selected district boundary color override.

events.name: district-hover
events.detail: { id, slug, name, displayName, nameEn, nameMl, district, value, data, normalized, source }
events.when: Pointer enters a district on hover-capable devices.
events.description: Signals that a district is being hovered and includes normalized district/data metadata.

events.name: district-leave
events.detail: { id, slug, name, displayName, nameEn, nameMl, district, value, data, normalized, source }

events.name: district-select
events.detail: { id, slug, name, displayName, nameEn, nameMl, district, value, data, normalized, source }
events.when: User clicks, taps, presses Enter, or presses Space on a focused district.
events.description: Signals selected district changes from user interaction.

cssProperties.name: --kerala-district-map-popup-color
cssProperties.description: Tooltip and mobile details text color.

cssProperties.name: --kerala-district-map-popup-backdrop-filter
cssProperties.description: Tooltip and mobile details backdrop filter.

methods.name: setTintColor
methods.description: Update the tint-color attribute and rerender.

methods.name: setHoverTemplate
methods.description: Set or clear the trusted hover/details template.

methods.name: getDistrictData
methods.description: Return normalized data for a district.

methods.name: clearSelection
methods.description: Clear the selected district and hide mobile details.

components.name: mood-reactions
components.title: Mood Reactions
components.summary: Animated 1–5 reaction picker with expressive faces, labels, and form participation.

stories.title: Default
stories.summary: The standard five-reaction picker with no labels.

stories.title: With labels
stories.summary: Default reactions with captions shown below each face.

stories.title: Preselected & clearable
stories.summary: Starts on the fourth reaction; clicking it again clears the selection.

stories.title: Custom items & colors
stories.summary: Three custom reactions, each with its own active color, via the items attribute.

stories.title: Vertical layout
stories.summary: Vertical orientation with labels above each face and custom sizing.

snippets.title: Read the selected reaction
Use inside a form
snippets.code:
<form>
  <label>How was your experience?</label>
  <mood-reactions name="experience" required labels></mood-reactions>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Selected reaction value. Default reactions use values 1 through 5.

attributes.name: items
attributes.description: Custom reaction list. JSON array of { face, value, label, ... } or CSV `face:value:label`. Faces: angry, sad, ok, good, happy.

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: When set, clicking the current selection clears the value.

attributes.name: labels
attributes.description: Show captions for each reaction.

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Where labels appear relative to the faces.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout direction of the reactions.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Face size in pixels. Overridden by scale when both are present.

attributes.name: scale
attributes.description: Scale multiplier for face size (0.4–4).

attributes.name: gap
attributes.description: Space between reactions; bare numbers are treated as pixels.

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description: Accessible label announced for the radiogroup.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name; enables form participation.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Requires a selection before the form can submit.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables interaction and dims the control.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Prevents user selection but still submits with the form.

events.name: input
events.detail: { value: string, index: number, item: object | null }
events.when: On user selection or interactive change.
events.description: Fires during interaction for real-time feedback.

events.name: change
events.detail: { value: string, index: number, item: object | null }
events.when: On user selection or interactive change.
events.description: Fires when the user completes a selection.

cssProperties.name: --mood-reactions-active-mouth
cssProperties.description: Mouth color on the selected face.

cssProperties.name: --mood-reactions-active-tear
cssProperties.description: Tear-drop color on the selected sad face.

cssProperties.name: --mood-reactions-gap
cssProperties.description: Space between reactions (set via the gap attribute).

methods.name: select
methods.signature: select(valueOrIndex: string | number, options?: { emit?: boolean }): void
methods.description: Select a reaction by value or index; emit dispatches input/change.

methods.name: configure
methods.description: Apply options programmatically; returns the element for chaining.

components.name: poster-charts
components.title: Poster Charts
components.summary: Bold data-poster SVG charts — eight infographic archetypes for chart-first storytelling.

stories.title: Stat with delta
stories.summary: Big-number callout with a directional delta pill.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="stat" label="Inherited arrears" accent="#E24536" source="Table 2.7" data='{"prefix":"₹","value":48733,"suffix":" cr","sub":"Inherited arrears stock","context":"as on 31 Mar 2026","delta":"+12%","deltaDir":"up"}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Gauge
stories.summary: Single value rendered as an arc ring.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="gauge" label="Own-tax realization" accent="#0F5132" source="Table 1.1" data='{"value":92,"max":100,"unit":"%","label":"of target","target":100}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Grouped bars
stories.summary: Paired vertical bars with a legend across two groups.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="bars" label="Estimates keep missing" accent="#F2A73B" source="Table 3.1" data='{"unit":"%","max":4.4,"legend":[{"label":"BE"},{"label":"Actual"}],"groups":[{"label":"Rev deficit","bars":[{"label":"BE","value":1.90},{"label":"Act","value":2.58}]},{"label":"Fis deficit","bars":[{"label":"BE","value":3.16},{"label":"Act","value":3.78}]}]}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Slope lines
stories.summary: Before/after slope lines across multiple series.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="slope" label="What gets squeezed" accent="#E24536" source="Tables 6.2/6.3" data='{"unit":"%","fromLabel":"2017-18","toLabel":"2025-26","lines":[{"label":"Plan share","from":23.18,"to":17.55},{"label":"Social services","from":53.78,"to":30.68},{"label":"SC/ST/OBC","from":9.24,"to":3.85}]}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Donut with center stat
stories.summary: Share-of-whole donut with a center value and legend.

stories.title: Heatstrip
stories.summary: Twelve state-colored cells with a legend.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="heatstrip" label="Treasury closed negative 10 of 12 months" accent="#E24536" source="Table 2.2" data='{"columns":12,"legend":[{"state":"neg","label":"Negative close","color":"#E24536"},{"state":"pos","label":"Positive","color":"#1FA463"}],"cells":[{"state":"neg","label":"A"},{"state":"neg","label":"M"},{"state":"neg","label":"J"},{"state":"neg","label":"J"},{"state":"pos","label":"A"},{"state":"neg","label":"S"},{"state":"neg","label":"O"},{"state":"neg","label":"N"},{"state":"neg","label":"D"},{"state":"neg","label":"J"},{"state":"pos","label":"F"},{"state":"neg","label":"M"}]}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Slate (dark) theme
stories.summary: Gauge rendered with the dark slate palette.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="gauge" theme="slate" label="Committed exp" source="Table 1.1" data='{"value":77.6,"unit":"%","label":"of revenue"}'></poster-chart>

stories.title: Bare mode
stories.summary: Stacked composition without the plate frame or header strip.
stories.html: <poster-chart type="stacked" bare label="₹100 of revenue" data='{"unit":"","segments":[{"label":"Committed (non-interest)","value":56.7},{"label":"Interest","value":20.9},{"label":"Left for development","value":22.4,"color":"#1FA463"}]}'></poster-chart>

snippets.title: Set data via the property
snippets.code:
const chart = document.querySelector('poster-chart');
chart.data = { prefix: '₹', value: 48733, suffix: ' cr', delta: '+12%', deltaDir: 'up' };

attributes.name: type
attributes.values: stat, gauge, bars, slope, heatstrip, donut, stacked, capacity
attributes.description: Chart archetype to render.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Color palette preset — kerala (light), slate (dark), ink (monochrome).

attributes.name: accent
attributes.description: Override accent color for the header strip and default series fills.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Header strip title (rendered uppercase).

attributes.name: source
attributes.description: Small source-attribution chip in the header strip.

attributes.name: caption
attributes.description: Supporting text rendered below the chart.

attributes.name: data
attributes.description: Chart configuration and data; shape depends on type. Can also be set via the .data property.

attributes.name: bare
attributes.description: Render without the plate frame and header strip.

attributes.name: animate
attributes.description: Set to off to disable motion; otherwise respects prefers-reduced-motion.

cssProperties.name: --poster-surface-sunk
cssProperties.description: Sunken background for legend and source chip.

cssProperties.name: --poster-accent
cssProperties.description: Header strip accent and default fill color.

cssProperties.name: --poster-display-font
cssProperties.description: Font family for the large numerals.

components.name: pulse-faces
components.title: Pulse Faces
components.summary: Animated SVG sentiment faces with selection, labels, sizing, and theming.

stories.title: Default display
stories.summary: The default four-face set rendered as a non-interactive display.

stories.title: With labels
stories.summary: Faces with captions shown below, at a larger size.

stories.title: Selectable picker
stories.summary: Clickable, keyboard-navigable picker with custom faces and a preselected value.

stories.title: Vertical with custom colors
stories.summary: Vertical orientation, labels above, with overridden face colors.
stories.html: <pulse-faces selectable labels label-position="top" orientation="vertical" size="64px" gap="12px" style="--pulse-faces-happy:#34d399;--pulse-faces-sad:#fb7185;"></pulse-faces>

snippets.title: Read the selected face
Required form field
snippets.code:
<form>
  <label>How are you feeling?</label>
  <pulse-faces selectable labels name="feeling" required></pulse-faces>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>

attributes.name: faces
attributes.description: Faces to render. JSON array or CSV `face:value:label:color`. Faces: sad, neutral, fine, happy.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Selected value when selectable/interactive is set.

attributes.name: selectable
attributes.description: Enable click and keyboard selection with input/change events.

attributes.name: interactive
attributes.description: Alias for selectable.

attributes.name: labels
attributes.description: Show caption text for each face.

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Where captions appear relative to faces.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Layout direction of the faces.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Icon size per face; bare numbers are treated as pixels.

attributes.name: gap
attributes.description: Space between adjacent faces.

attributes.name: paused
attributes.description: Freeze all face animations.

attributes.name: animated
attributes.description: Set to "false" to disable animations (alternative to paused).

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Mark as required for form validation.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name and accessible label.

events.name: input
events.detail: { value: string, index: number, item: object | null }
events.when: On click or keyboard selection while selectable.

events.name: change
events.detail: { value: string, index: number, item: object | null }
events.when: On click or completed keyboard selection while selectable.
events.description: Selection confirmation. Fires only when the value actually changes.

cssProperties.name: --pulse-faces-ink
cssProperties.description: Color of eyes, mouth, and features.

methods.name: select
methods.signature: select(valueOrIndex: string | number, options?: { emit?: boolean }): void
methods.description: Select a face by value or index; emit dispatches input/change.

methods.name: configure
methods.description: Apply options programmatically; returns the element for chaining.

components.name: spin-maze
components.title: Spin Maze
components.summary: Rotating maze puzzle game as an iframe-isolated custom element.

stories.title: Classic
stories.summary: Default classic theme with the built-in level set.

stories.title: Night theme
stories.summary: Dark night palette.

stories.title: Custom levels
stories.summary: Inject a custom level via the levels JSON attribute on the candy theme.
stories.html:
<spin-maze theme="candy" height="560px" levels='[{"id":"tiny","blurb":"Demo","instruction":"Drag the cub to the star","map":"*=.=.
    !
. . .
    !
@=.=."}]'></spin-maze>

stories.title: Hidden level picker
stories.summary: Forest theme with the level picker button hidden.

snippets.title: React to level completion

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Game/iframe height as any CSS length.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Color theme palette.

attributes.name: level
attributes.description: Initial level id to load.

attributes.name: storage-key
attributes.description: localStorage namespace for current and completed levels.

attributes.name: show-levels
attributes.description: Show or hide the level picker button.

attributes.name: button-label
attributes.description: Level picker button text.

attributes.name: next-label
attributes.description: Next-level button text.

attributes.name: levels
attributes.description: Custom level array of { id, blurb, instruction, map } objects.

events.name: complete
events.when: The player reaches the goal/star position.
events.description: Signals level completion with the current level id and all completed level ids.

methods.name: configure
methods.description: Apply options (theme, height, level, levels, labels, showLevels) programmatically; returns the element for chaining.
